settings.question: Do I need to create a Lynxtour account before I can book?
settings.answer:
You may book most tours directly on Lynxtour. For selected services, we may ask for traveler details during checkout or after booking confirmation.

To book an activity on Lynxtour:

  1. Browse through activities for something that interests you
  2. Select the packages you'd like to purchase
  3. Enter your details
  4. Make your payment

All that's left to do is wait for your booking to be confirmed.

settings.question: Can I book an activity on behalf of someone else?
settings.answer:
Yes. Just be sure to provide their details when finalizing your booking details to make a booking on behalf of your family and friends.

Do note that some Lynxtour vouchers are non-transferrable and can only be used by the person whose details are indicated on the voucher. As such, please make sure that you've keyed in the correct guest details when making your booking.

settings.question: Are activity times shown in my time zone or the activity's time zone?
settings.answer:
All times shown are in the local time zone where the activity is held.

For example, if you are looking at an activity for Yunnan and the time is stated as 09:00, that means 09:00 Yunnan time.

settings.question: Why can't I select the date/time I want for my activity?
settings.answer:
If you are trying to make a booking more than a few months away, we may not have those tickets in stock yet. Please check back closer to your activity date to purchase those tickets then.

The tickets may also be sold out due to high demand. We apologise for any inconvenience caused.

settings.question: Where can I find the meeting/pick-up point for my activity?
settings.answer:
Before your booking

You can check for the meeting/pick-up point for your booking in the "Package Details > How to use" section of the activity page.

After your booking

You can check for the meeting/pick-up point for your booking in the **"How to Use" section of your *voucher*, or on the *"Package Details > How to use"* section of the activity page.

settings.question: When will I receive my booking confirmation?
settings.answer:
This depends on the policy of your activity.

  • For activities with instant confirmation: You will receive your booking confirmation email within 5 minutes of making your booking.
  • For activities without instant confirmation: You will receive your booking confirmation within 24-48 hours of making your booking. Check the package details > Confirmation section of your booking/activity page for the booking confirmation time for your activity.

If you have not received your booking confirmation even after the time mentioned above, please refer to here.

settings.question: What happens after I make my booking?
settings.answer: After booking, you will receive a confirmation email with your booking details. If you cannot find it, please check your spam folder first, then contact us with your name and travel date.

settings.question: How can I contact Lynxtour's Customer Support?
settings.answer: For help with an existing booking, please contact us by WhatsApp, email, or the contact form on our Contact Us page. To help us assist you faster, please include your full name, booking reference, travel date, and a short description of the issue.

settings.question: Where can I find my bookings?
settings.answer: After booking, you will receive a confirmation email with your booking details. If you cannot find your confirmation, please check your spam folder first, then contact us with your name and travel date.

settings.question: What will happen if I cancel my booking?
settings.answer:
You will receive a cancellation email that confirms your booking has been cancelled.

  • Your payment for the booking will be refunded to the payment method which you used to book your activity.
  • Depending on your payment method, your refund can take 7-14 days to be reflected in your account.

For more information on Lynxtour's refund policies, please refer to the "Payments and Refunds > Refunds" section of the Help Center.

settings.question: How much LynxCash can I earn from writing reviews?
settings.answer:
Reviews are a great way to help other people thinking of booking the same activity.

You could earn LynxCash for the first 10 reviews that you write each month.

For reviews of 100 characters and longer , you can earn 20 LynxCash per review.

Additionally, if you upload 3 or more photos, you can earn 30 LynxCash per review.

Do note that you won't earn LynxCash for reviews on the following:

  • Free bookings
  • Bookings made again within 30 days of taking part in the previous one
  • Bookings with a total value of below US$5
  • Activities with more than 100 reviews at the time of reviewing
  • Flights and High Speed Rail

settings.question: Can I change my name on a review?
settings.answer: The name shown on your review is based on the traveler details submitted with your booking or your account profile, depending on how the review request was generated.

settings.question: Why can't I see my review on the activity page?
settings.answer:
Lynxtour reviews are displayed automatically, based on the submitted date, rating, or "helpfulness".
If you cannot find your review, please contact us with your booking reference and approximate submission date.

If the review or the photos you've uploaded don't meet our content guidelines, your review won't be publicly visible.

settings.question: Why can't I write a review for my booking?
settings.answer: Reviews must be written within a month of your activity date (in your booking details), no earlier or later.

settings.question: Why didn't I earn LynxCash for my review?
settings.answer:
If you’ve already submitted 10 reviews this month, you won’t earn LynxCash for any additional reviews.

Do note that you won't earn LynxCash for reviews on the following:

  • Free bookings
  • Bookings made again within 30 days of taking part in the previous one
  • Bookings with a total value of below US$5
  • Activities with more than 100 reviews at the time of reviewing
  • Flights and High Speed Rail

Do double-check that your review meets all the requirements (like character count and photos). If everything looks good and you're still missing LynxCash, please reach out to Lynxtour's Customer Support for help.

For the full list of terms, check out our Terms & Conditions.

settings.question: Is my payment secure?
settings.answer: Lynxtour uses secure third-party payment gateways to process payments. We do not store your full credit card details on our website.

settings.question: Will I be charged an international transaction fee for my booking?
settings.answer:
Lynxtour does not charge any additional handling fees for booking an activity, but some banks may charge international transaction fees if you are not paying in the local currency of your payment card. Please check with your bank before making a booking.

Heads up: There might be extra fees when using PayPal. Contact your bank for more details.

settings.question: What currencies does Lynxtour accept?
settings.answer: Lynxtour accepts the currencies shown on the website and at checkout. Available currencies may vary depending on your market, payment method, and product type.

settings.question: What payment methods can I use on Lynxtour?
settings.answer: Lynxtour supports the payment methods shown at checkout. Available options may vary depending on your location, currency, product type, and order amount. If a payment method does not appear on the checkout page, it is currently not available for that booking.

settings.question: Why did my payment fail?
settings.answer:
If you're experiencing issues when making your payment, please try the following:

1. Double-check your card details.

2. Confirm your card supports online and international payments.

3. Try another browser or device.

4. Try another card or payment method.

5. If you used a promo code, review its terms first.

If you are still unable to complete your purchase, please get in touch with Lynxtour Customer Support  for further assistance and we'll do our best to help you resolve the issue.

settings.question: I've found an unknown purchase on Lynxtour in my bank account statement. What should I do?
settings.answer: If you notice an unfamiliar charge, first compare it with your recent bookings and confirmation emails. If you still believe the charge is unauthorized, contact your bank immediately and then reach out to Lynxtour support with the charge date, amount, and any relevant screenshots.

settings.question: Can I use a credit/debit card that is not under my name to place an order?
settings.answer: No. For security reasons, bookings should be made using a credit or debit card issued in the traveler's or payer's name, subject to bank and payment verification.

settings.question: Where can I find my receipt?
settings.answer: If you need an invoice or receipt, please email us with your booking reference and billing details. We will send it to you after verification.

settings.question: Can I amend my booking details?
settings.answer: If you need to change your travel date or traveler details, please contact us as early as possible. Changes are subject to the policy of the specific tour or service and availability at the time of request.

settings.question: Can I add or remove participants from my booking?
settings.answer: Changes to the number of travelers depend on the policy of the specific tour or service and availability on your travel date. If you need to add or remove participants, please contact us as early as possible by email, WhatsApp, or the contact form. We will confirm whether the change is possible and whether any price difference applies.

settings.question: How long will it take to receive my refund?
settings.answer: Refund timing depends on the original payment method and the policy of your bank or payment provider. In most cases, approved refunds appear within 7–14 business days, but some methods may take longer.

settings.question: How can I cancel or request a refund for my booking?
settings.answer: Cancellation and refund eligibility depend on the policy of the specific tour or service you booked. If your booking allows changes or cancellations, please contact us as early as possible with your full name, booking reference, travel date, and reason for the request. Once we verify the booking conditions, we will confirm whether a cancellation, refund, or partial refund can be arranged.

settings.question: What can I do if I missed my booking due to a delayed/cancelled flight?
settings.answer: If your travel plans are affected by a delayed or cancelled flight, please contact us as soon as possible with your booking reference and supporting documents. We will review the booking policy and do our best to assist.

settings.question: What does "Conditional cancellation" mean?
settings.answer: Activities with conditional cancellation may be refunded only if specific requirements are met, such as weather conditions, operating restrictions, or supplier approval. If you believe your booking qualifies, please contact us with your booking reference and supporting details so we can review it with the local operator.

settings.question: Will my LynxCash and promo codes be refunded if I cancel my activity?
settings.answer:
1. LynxCash

Any LynxCash you've used will automatically be refunded to your account. You will be able to use these LynxCash to make another booking.

  1. Promo codes

Please check the Terms & Conditions of the promo code you've used.

  • If your promo code is one time use only, unfortunately we cannot provide you with a new promo code
  • If your promo code is not one time use only, the code will automatically be added to your account and you can use it on another booking.

settings.question: What should I do if I feel unwell at high altitudes?
settings.answer: If you experience headaches, dizziness, or shortness of breath, please stop moving and rest immediately. Avoid drinking alcohol and stay hydrated. Most hotels and tour vehicles in high-altitude areas are equipped with oxygen canisters for your use.

settings.question: How can I get medical help during the trip?
settings.answer:
For non-emergencies, inform your guide or driver who can assist you in finding the nearest pharmacy or clinic.
For urgent medical needs during your trip, please contact your guide, driver, or our emergency support channel immediately so we can help coordinate local assistance.

settings.question: Can I request an itinerary change due to my physical condition?
settings.answer: Yes. If you feel unable to continue a high-altitude hike or activity, please notify your guide as early as possible. We will do our best to arrange a lower-altitude alternative or more rest time, though additional costs may apply depending on the change.

settings.question: What happens if my tour is delayed by road closures?
settings.answer: Mountain weather or local events can sometimes cause unexpected road closures. Our local team monitors these in real-time. If a closure occurs, your guide will suggest an adjusted schedule or an alternative route to ensure your safety and minimize impact on your trip.

settings.question: Will I get a refund if an attraction is inaccessible?
settings.answer: If a primary destination becomes completely unreachable due to official traffic control or safety reasons, we will offer a partial refund for the unvisited portion or provide a substitute activity of equal value.

settings.question: How will I be updated on traffic changes?
settings.answer: Your guide, driver, or local coordinator will contact you by phone, WhatsApp, WeChat, or email as soon as we receive official traffic updates.

settings.question: How do I report an issue with my guide or driver?
settings.answer: If you are unhappy with the service quality during your trip, please contact us immediately by WhatsApp, email, or the contact form so we can try to resolve the issue as quickly as possible.

settings.question: How can I share my travel photos and feedback?
settings.answer: After your trip, you are welcome to share your feedback, photos, and suggestions with us by email or through the review request we send after selected bookings.

settings.question: How do I file a formal complaint after my trip?
settings.answer: For issues that weren't resolved during the trip, please email official@lynxtour.com within 7 days of your trip completion. Please include your Order ID and any supporting evidence (photos or videos) for a formal investigation.

settings.question: What is the best time to visit Kunming, Dali, Lijiang, and Shangri-La?
settings.answer:
Kunming and Dali are pleasant year-round due to their "eternal spring" climate.

For Lijiang and Shangri-La, autumn (September–November) offers the most stable weather and clearest mountain views.

settings.question: When should I avoid traveling to Yunnan?
settings.answer: To avoid heavy crowds, try to steer clear of Chinese public holidays, especially the "Golden Week" (first week of October) and the Chinese New Year.

settings.question: When can I see the cherry blossoms or snow-capped peaks?
settings.answer: Cherry blossoms in Dali usually bloom in late December or March. For guaranteed snow on the peaks of Jade Dragon or Meili, visit between December and February.

settings.question: How should I dress for the drastic temperature changes?
settings.answer: Yunnan has "four seasons in one day." Use the layering method: a breathable base layer, a fleece or sweater for insulation, and a windproof/waterproof outer shell.

settings.question: What kind of shoes are best for Yunnan?
settings.answer: Comfortable, broken-in walking shoes or light hiking boots with good grip are essential, as many ancient towns have uneven cobblestone streets.

settings.question: Why do I need strong sunscreen in Yunnan?
settings.answer: The UV radiation is significantly stronger at high altitudes. We recommend SPF 50+ sunscreen, polarized sunglasses, a wide-brimmed hat, and lip balm to prevent dryness.

settings.item_id: High-Altitude Mountains: Jade Dragon, Meili, Shangri-La
settings.title: High-Altitude Mountains: Jade Dragon, Meili, Shangri-La

settings.item_id: High-Altitude Mountains: Jade Dragon, Meili, Shangri-La
settings.question: How can I prepare for heights over 3,000 meters?
settings.answer: Arrive in a mid-altitude city like Lijiang first to acclimate for a day before heading higher. Avoid smoking, drinking alcohol, and over-exertion during your first 24 hours.

settings.item_id: High-Altitude Mountains: Jade Dragon, Meili, Shangri-La
settings.question: What should I know when visiting sacred mountains?
settings.answer: These mountains are sacred to the Naxi and Tibetan people. Please do not litter, stay on marked paths, and always walk clockwise around religious structures like stupas or prayer wheels.

settings.item_id: High-Altitude Mountains: Jade Dragon, Meili, Shangri-La
settings.question: Are these mountain trips suitable for children or seniors?
settings.answer: Most scenic areas have cable cars and wooden planks making them accessible, but we recommend consulting a doctor for those with pre-existing heart or respiratory conditions.

settings.question: When is the best light for mountain photography?
settings.answer: Sunrise and sunset offer the most dramatic light on the peaks (known as "Golden Mountain"). Be at your viewing point at least 30 minutes before dawn.

settings.question: Does it rain all day during the monsoon (June–August)?
settings.answer: Rain usually comes in short, heavy bursts followed by sunshine. Always carry a compact umbrella or a lightweight poncho in your daypack.

settings.question: How do I protect my camera from the elements?
settings.answer: Bring a waterproof cover for your camera bag and extra batteries, as the cold air at high altitudes can drain battery life faster than usual.

settings.question: How do I create a new account?
settings.answer: Click "Sign Up" on the homepage. You can register using your email, phone number, or quickly link your Google/Facebook account.

settings.question: I didn't receive my verification code. What should I do?
settings.answer: Please check your spam folder first. If it's still missing, wait 60 seconds and click "Resend." Ensure your email/phone number was entered correctly.

settings.question: How can I reset my password?
settings.answer: Go to the Login page, click "Forgot Password," and follow the instructions sent to your registered email or phone.

settings.question: Can I change my registered email or phone number?
settings.answer: If you need to update your contact information or request deletion of account-related data, please contact us by email. We will verify your request before processing any changes.

settings.question: How do I delete my account and data?
settings.answer: If you need to update your contact information or request deletion of account-related data, please contact us by email. We will verify your request before processing any changes.

settings.question: What is the Lynxtour Satisfaction Guarantee?
settings.answer: We promise that the services provided will match the descriptions on our platform. If there is a major discrepancy, we offer compensation or partial refunds.

settings.question: How do I claim a compensation for poor service?
settings.answer: If the service did not meet our guaranteed standards, please submit a "Quality Claim" with supporting photos/videos through the Order Details page within 7 days.

settings.question: Which is the fastest way to get help?
settings.answer: For immediate assistance during your trip, use our WhatsApp or WeChat live support. For non-urgent booking inquiries, the Online Form or Email is recommended.

settings.question: How do I track my inquiry status?
settings.answer: If you submitted an Online Form or Email, you will receive a ticket number. You can reply directly to that thread to check for updates.

settings.question: When is your customer service team available?
settings.answer: Our office hours are Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM–6:00 PM (GMT+8). For urgent travel issues, please contact us through the fastest available channel listed on the Contact Us page.

settings.question: Will I get support during public holidays?
settings.answer: Yes! Our emergency travel support operates every day of the year, including holidays, to ensure your trip stays on track.

settings.question: What counts as a "Travel Emergency"?
settings.answer: Situations like being unable to find your driver, denied entry to a pre-booked site, sudden illness, or safety concerns are considered emergencies.

settings.question: What are the steps to follow in an emergency?
settings.answer: In case of urgent travel issues, please contact us immediately by WhatsApp or phone. We will respond as quickly as possible based on local operating hours and the nature of the issue.
